blockers_encountered.scope: AC-012 perf gate at canonical scale
blockers_encountered.summary: p50=140.95ms (budget 20ms; 7.05× over). p99=458ms (budget 150ms; 3.05× over). Test panics on assertion line 474 of perf_gates.rs.
blockers_encountered.recommended_action: HITL decides among: (a) Pack 7 lands in 0.6.1 (engine work to close AC-012 budget — root-cause TBD; likely FTS5 path tuning); (b) Pack 7 escalates to 0.7.x and 0.6.1 ships under a re-titled scope NOT claiming AC-012 closure; (c) re-open ADR-0.6.0-text-query-latency-gates to assess whether the budget is achievable on canonical x86_64 4-core ubuntu-latest at all (budget-revision is a minor-release ADR change; not patch-release-safe per ADR-0.6.0-no-shims-policy § 54).

open_hitl_questions.options: (a) Land Pack 7 in 0.6.1 scope (engine work to close AC-012 budget). | (b) Escalate Pack 7 to 0.7.x; re-title 0.6.1 to drop the AC-012 claim. | (c) Open a new ADR to revise the AC-012 budget; this is a minor-release change, not a patch.
open_hitl_questions.recommendation: (b) Escalate to 0.7.x. The 0.6.1 patch-release contract (ADR-0.6.0-no-shims-policy § 54) does not allow new engine work or budget revision; the other three closures (OPENREPORT-py/ts, Dependabot, axis-E demo) are independent and patch-safe. Re-title 0.6.1's plan-doc § Status to drop the AC-012 closure claim; carry the RED measurement forward as evidence for the 0.7.x Pack 7 work.

open_hitl_questions.options: (a) Add a tiny scripts/sqlite-version/ cargo crate that prints rusqlite::version() and update the workflow. | (b) Inline a `cargo run --example` invocation if a suitable example exists. | (c) Skip — Cargo.lock proxy (libsqlite3-sys = 0.28.0) is sufficient for the release-notes audit trail.
open_hitl_questions.recommendation: (c) for 0.6.1; (a) for 0.7.0 if Pack 7 work touches SQLite version pinning.

next_step_for_orchestrator: Surface Q-A1 to HITL immediately — this is the critical decision that determines whether 0.6.1 ships at all in current shape. If (b) is chosen, update dev/plans/0.6.1-implementation.md § Status + § Slice sequence to drop AC012-measure as a CLOSING slice (it remains a documentation slice that records the RED measurement; AC-012 stays DEFERRED, just with fresher numbers); proceed with OPENREPORT-py/ts + DEPENDABOT + AXIS-E-PIN + B-001 + BUMP + RC1 + V + GA. If (a) is chosen, Pack 7 work blocks BUMP and orchestrator opens the Pack 7 sub-planning slice.
